diff_summary: Removed support for claude-2.0 model
raw_content:
## Breaking Change
The claude-2.0 model has been retired and is no longer available via the API. All requests to claude-2.0 will return a 404. Migration required to claude-3 or later.

diff_summary: Breaking change: removed /v1/complete endpoint
raw_content: The legacy /v1/complete endpoint has been permanently removed. All users must migrate to /v1/messages. This is a backwards incompatible change.

diff_summary: Removed CLAUDE.md include syntax breaking backward compatibility
raw_content:
## Breaking Change
The @include directive in CLAUDE.md files has been removed. Projects using @include must refactor to use direct file references. Migration required.

diff_summary: Removed deprecated async_complete method from client
raw_content:
## Breaking Change
The async_complete() method has been removed from AnthropicClient. Use messages.create() instead. This is a backwards incompatible change.

diff_summary: Removed legacy streaming interface breaking existing integrations
raw_content:
## Breaking Change
The Stream class has been removed in favor of MessageStream. All code using new Anthropic().completions.create() must migrate. Migration required.

diff_summary: Breaking change: transport protocol version bump removes SSE support
raw_content:
## Breaking Change
MCP transport protocol v2 removes Server-Sent Events (SSE) in favor of StreamableHTTP. All MCP server implementations must update. This is backward incompatible.

diff_summary: Removed support for max_tokens_to_sample parameter
raw_content:
## Breaking Change
The max_tokens_to_sample parameter is no longer accepted. Use max_tokens instead. Requests including the old parameter will return a 400 error.

diff_summary: Deprecated claude-instant-1.2 model scheduled for end of life
raw_content:
## Deprecation Notice
The claude-instant-1.2 model is now deprecated and will be removed on 2026-06-01. Please migrate to claude-3-haiku. End of life notice.

diff_summary: Deprecated the human/assistant prompt format
raw_content:
## Deprecation
The 

Human: / 

Assistant: prompt format is deprecated. Use the messages API format instead. Will be removed in Q3 2026.

diff_summary: Deprecated completion() method will be removed in v1.0
raw_content:
## Deprecation
The completion() method is deprecated in favor of messages.create(). It will be removed in the next major version. Please migrate.

diff_summary: Deprecated slash command /review in favor of /code-review
raw_content:
## Deprecation
The /review slash command is deprecated and will be removed in a future release. Use /code-review instead. Sunset scheduled for March 2026.

diff_summary: Deprecated resources/list without pagination parameter
raw_content:
## Deprecation Notice
Calling resources/list without the cursor parameter is now deprecated. All implementations should include pagination support. Will be removed in MCP 2.0.

diff_summary: Deprecated Anthropic.HUMAN_PROMPT and Anthropic.AI_PROMPT constants
raw_content:
## Deprecation
The HUMAN_PROMPT and AI_PROMPT string constants are deprecated. Use the messages API which does not require prompt formatting. End of life Q4 2026.

diff_summary: Added support for tool_use with streaming responses
raw_content:
## New Feature
Tool use is now supported in streaming mode. Added new content_block events for tool_use and tool_result. Now supports parallel tool execution.

diff_summary: New feature: MCP tool support added to Claude Code
raw_content:
## New Feature
Claude Code now supports MCP (Model Context Protocol) tools natively. Added support for connecting to MCP servers via stdio and SSE transports. Introducing tool discovery.

diff_summary: Added new vision capabilities documentation
raw_content:
## Enhancement
New documentation for Claude's vision capabilities. Now supports analyzing images in messages. Introducing multi-modal input support with base64 and URL references.

diff_summary: Added support for new beta features header in SDK
raw_content:
## Enhancement
Introducing beta features support. The SDK now supports passing anthropic-beta headers for accessing preview features. New feature for prompt caching.

diff_summary: New feature: added PostgreSQL MCP server to ecosystem
raw_content:
## New Server
Introducing a new PostgreSQL MCP server for database interactions. Added support for queries, schema inspection, and migration management.

diff_summary: Added new prompt caching cookbook example
raw_content:
## New Example
Introducing a comprehensive prompt caching cookbook. Added new patterns for reducing token usage with cache_control blocks. Now supports system prompt caching.

diff_summary: Added support for extended thinking in TypeScript SDK
raw_content:
## New Feature
The TypeScript SDK now supports extended thinking (chain-of-thought). Introducing the thinking content block type and budget_tokens parameter.

diff_summary: Now supports custom slash commands from .claude/commands/
raw_content:
## Enhancement
Claude Code now supports user-defined slash commands. Add .md files to .claude/commands/ or ~/.claude/commands/ and they become available as /commands. Introducing skill loading.

diff_summary: Security vulnerability patched in API gateway authentication
raw_content:
## Security Fix
Patched a security vulnerability in the API gateway that could allow authentication bypass under specific conditions. CVE-2026-4821 resolved. All API keys rotated.

diff_summary: Security fix: patched token injection vulnerability in prompt formatting
raw_content:
## Security Update
Fixed a vulnerability where specially crafted input could inject additional tokens into prompts. CVE-2026-3392 has been assigned. Patched security issue in input sanitization.

diff_summary: Security: fixed credential exposure vulnerability in error logs
raw_content:
## Security Patch
Fixed a security issue where API keys could be exposed in error stack traces when using debug logging. CVE-2026-5510. Vulnerability in credential handling patched.

diff_summary: Security advisory: authentication bypass in MCP transport layer
raw_content:
## Security Advisory
A vulnerability was discovered in the MCP transport authentication handshake. CVE-2026-6201. Allows unauthenticated access to tools. Security patch available.

diff_summary: Security: patched sandbox escape vulnerability in Bash tool
raw_content:
## Security Fix
Patched a security vulnerability where the Bash tool could escape its sandbox under certain conditions. CVE-2026-7788. All users should update immediately.

diff_summary: Security patch for API rate limiting bypass vulnerability
raw_content:
## Security Update
Fixed a vulnerability that allowed bypassing API rate limits through request header manipulation. CVE-2026-8103. Security improvement to rate limiting system.

diff_summary: Performance improvement: 40% faster token generation for claude-3.5-sonnet
raw_content:
## Performance
Optimized the inference pipeline for claude-3.5-sonnet, achieving 40% faster token generation. Reduced latency from 45ms to 27ms per token. Throughput significantly improved.

diff_summary: Performance optimization guide for batch processing added
raw_content:
## Optimization Guide
New documentation on optimized batch processing patterns. Demonstrates faster parallel request handling with reduced latency using the batches API.

diff_summary: Optimized connection pooling for faster API requests
raw_content:
## Performance Improvement
Optimized HTTP connection pooling in the Python SDK. Reduced connection overhead by 60%. Faster request throughput for high-volume applications.

diff_summary: Performance: reduced memory usage in streaming responses by 35%
raw_content:
## Optimization
Optimized memory allocation during streaming response processing. Reduced peak memory usage by 35%. Faster garbage collection with smaller buffer allocations.

diff_summary: Optimized file indexing for faster codebase search performance
raw_content:
## Performance
Optimized the file indexing engine for large codebases. Search performance improved by 50%. Reduced latency for Grep and Glob operations. Faster startup time.

diff_summary: Performance: optimized MCP server startup time reduced by 70%
raw_content:
## Performance Update
Optimized MCP server initialization. Startup time reduced from 3s to 0.9s. Faster tool discovery and capability negotiation. Throughput improved.

diff_summary: Updated documentation formatting and typo fixes
raw_content: Minor formatting changes to the API reference documentation. Fixed several typos in the authentication guide. Updated code examples for clarity.

diff_summary: Published blog post about responsible AI development practices
raw_content: New blog post discussing Anthropic's approach to responsible AI development. Covers safety research updates and alignment methodology. Informational post with no API changes.

diff_summary: Updated documentation for existing classification cookbook
raw_content: Minor updates to the text classification cookbook. Fixed a typo in the system prompt example. Clarified the output format description. No functional changes.

diff_summary: Community discussion about best practices for CLAUDE.md files
raw_content: Community thread discussing recommended patterns for CLAUDE.md project instructions. Various user experiences shared. Informational discussion with no code changes.

diff_summary: Scheduled maintenance window announced for March 15 2026
raw_content: Scheduled maintenance notification for March 15, 2026 from 02:00-04:00 UTC. Expected brief interruption to API services. Informational notice. No action required at this time.

diff_summary: Updated documentation clarifying MCP capability negotiation process
raw_content: Clarified the capability negotiation section of the MCP specification. Fixed a typo in the sequence diagram. Updated examples for readability. No protocol changes.

diff_summary: Published research paper summary on constitutional AI improvements
raw_content: Blog post summarizing recent constitutional AI research findings. Discusses improvements to harmlessness training. Informational update with no product changes.

diff_summary: Updated documentation for issue template with clearer guidelines
raw_content: Updated the issue template to include clearer reproduction steps guidelines. Fixed a typo in the template header. Minor documentation improvement.

diff_summary: Added support for new citation content blocks in messages API
raw_content:
## New Feature
The messages API now supports citation content blocks. Introducing source attribution for model responses. Added new cite and cited_content block types.

diff_summary: Deprecated the legacy usage dashboard in console
raw_content:
## Deprecation
The legacy usage dashboard in the Anthropic Console is deprecated. A new analytics dashboard will replace it. End of life for the old dashboard is April 2026.

diff_summary: Updated documentation for filesystem MCP server README
raw_content: Updated the filesystem MCP server README with clearer installation instructions. Fixed a typo in the configuration section. No functional changes to the server.

diff_summary: Optimized embedding generation example for faster batch processing
raw_content:
## Performance Update
Optimized the embedding generation cookbook example. Demonstrates faster batch processing with parallel requests. Reduced latency by 45% in the example.

diff_summary: Security: reported vulnerability in hook configuration parsing
raw_content:
## Security Report
A vulnerability was reported in hook configuration parsing that could allow command injection. CVE-2026-9912. Security fix deployed in latest release.

diff_summary: Performance: optimized API gateway routing reduced p99 latency
raw_content:
## Infrastructure Update
Optimized API gateway routing. Reduced p99 latency from 200ms to 120ms. Faster request processing across all model endpoints. Throughput increased by 25%.

diff_summary: Breaking change: removed support for XML tool_use format
raw_content:
## Breaking Change
The XML-based tool_use format has been removed from the API. All tool use must now use the JSON content block format. Migration required for all tool-using applications.

diff_summary: Deprecated the legacy stdio transport adapter in MCP servers
raw_content:
## Deprecation
The legacy stdio transport adapter is deprecated in favor of the new StreamableHTTP transport. Will be removed in the next major release. End of life Q2 2026.

diff_summary: Security advisory: third-party integration credential exposure
raw_content:
## Security Advisory
A security vulnerability was identified in a third-party integration that could expose API credentials. CVE-2026-1155. All affected users notified. Vulnerability patched.
